You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

[10-12] The text overlay changes to 'Dumplings' while the checkered background and faint circular stain remain constant.

[14-26] A high-angle shot displays a clear glass bowl centered on a light wood grain surface, holding a central mound of white powder. During [14-16], the lighting brightens considerably, fully illuminating the flour pile and the wood texture beneath the transparent vessel, removing prior shadows. From [16-26], the shot remains static with the white powder undisturbed inside the vessel. Steady, bright lighting continues to highlight the flour's texture and the table beneath without any visible movement or alteration to the scene.

[26-28] The scene cuts to a small lime-green bowl centered on a wooden surface, replacing a glass bowl of flour. Inside rest two scoops of a pale yellow, creamy substance with a smooth texture. [28-36] The static high-angle shot persists, featuring the small lime-green bowl on the light wood grain table. The two scoops of pale yellow substance remain completely undisturbed. Bright lighting highlights the smooth texture and table grain, with no visible movement or alterations occurring within the frame.

From 36s to 46s, the static high-angle shot features a small lime-green bowl centered on a light wood grain table. Inside, two scoops of pale yellow, creamy substance remain undisturbed. Bright, even lighting highlights the smooth texture of the ingredient and the wooden surface. No movement, alterations, or interactions occur; the scene is entirely still, maintaining the same composition and lighting conditions throughout the duration.

compressed_segments.text: [0-8] A static high-angle shot features a lime-green square bowl on a light wood grain surface, filled with brown broth, three textured dumplings, and orange carrot chunks. [10-12] The text overlay changes to 'Dumplings' while the checkered background and faint circular stain remain constant. [14-26] A high-angle shot displays a clear glass bowl centered on a light wood grain surface, holding a central mound of white powder. From [16-26], the shot remains static with the white powder undisturbed inside the vessel. Steady, bright lighting continues to highlight the flour's texture and the table beneath without any visible movement or alteration to the scene. [26-28] The scene cuts to a small lime-green bowl centered on a wooden surface, replacing a glass bowl of flour. Inside rest two scoops of a pale yellow, creamy substance with a smooth texture. [28-36] The static high-angle shot persists, featuring the small lime-green bowl on the light wood grain table.

[46-48] A beige plastic measuring cup filled with clear liquid appears centered on the wooden surface, handle pointing right. [48-50] The scene cuts to a clear glass bowl centered on the light wood grain surface, holding a central mound of white powder. [50-56] A hand enters from the bottom right holding a small lime-green bowl containing a pale yellow creamy substance. A wooden spoon scrapes the substance out of the green bowl, depositing it directly onto the flour inside the larger clear glass vessel. [56-58] The green bowl is removed. A hand wielding a wooden spoon starts to blend the ingredients, pushing the yellow mass into the flour mound centered on the wooden table.

[58-62] A hand uses a wooden spoon to vigorously mix a pale yellow substance into white flour inside a clear glass bowl, pushing and turning ingredients to break up the yellow mass. [62-66] A bare hand enters the bowl, replacing the spoon, and uses fingers to press and combine the yellow substance with the flour mixture directly, digging into the crumbly texture to work ingredients together. [66-68] The mixing action concludes, leaving a coarse, crumbly mixture of pale yellow and white ingredients inside the vessel. [68-70] A hand holds a small clump of the combined substance near the rim to showcase texture, then brings a beige plastic measuring cup into view over the bowl on the light wood grain surface.

[70-72] A hand holds a beige plastic measuring cup over a clear glass bowl containing a crumbly mixture, then removes it to resume manually mixing the pale yellow and white ingredients on a light wood surface. [72-78] Fingers press and turn the coarse mixture against the vessel's sides and bottom, making the texture increasingly uniform and cohesive as the hand kneads the dry and fatty components together. [78-82] The hand gathers the pale yellow crumbs in the center, consolidating the loose texture into larger clumps. The manual blending continues, causing the ingredients to appear more clumped and less distinct within the transparent container.

[82-94] A hand kneads a pale yellow mixture inside a clear glass bowl situated on a light wooden surface. Initially, the substance appears crumbly and loose. Fingers press and fold the ingredients against the vessel's bottom and sides, working to consolidate the texture. As the manual blending continues, the loose crumbs are gathered and pressed together, reducing granules. The mixture transitions from a granular state into a larger, cohesive clump. By the end, the hand manipulates the pliable mixture, forming a smoother, solid ball of dough while gathering remaining loose particles against the bowl's interior.
